title: reshardCollection workflow — online shard key change on large sharded collection
migration_snippet:
# Goal: change shard key of orders collection from {region: 1} to {customer_id: 1, _id: 1}
# Current: orders sharded by region, causing hot shard on 'us-east'
# Target: distribute by customer_id for even load
# Collection: 80M documents across 4 shards, MongoDB 6.0
expected_feedback: Workflow: reshardCollection (5.0+) performs an online shard key change. Steps: (1) Verify no other resharding in progress via sh.status(). (2) Run db.adminCommand({reshardCollection: 'mydb.orders', key: {customer_id: 1, _id: 1}}). (3) Monitor progress via sh.status() and currentOp — resharding creates a temporary collection and streams data. (4) Duration is proportional to collection size (80M docs may take hours). (5) Brief exclusive lock at final cutover moment. (6) Post-reshard: verify chunk distribution with db.orders.getShardDistribution(). (7) Rollback: can abort during resharding; data stays on original shard key. Write concern w:majority recommended during the process.
